---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm trying to simulate [X] microscopy modality / labelling strategy but currently there is no way to [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Scientific context**
If relevant, provide context about the biological or imaging scenario this would address (e.g. specific microscopy modality, labelling scheme, structure type, experimental use case).

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you have tried.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, references, or example images about the feature request here.
